viability_read.abstain_interpretation: Most abstains are off-topic, stage-audio, skincare-primary, or incoherent caption captures; this is a capture/admission precision signal rather than a rubric class failure.
viability_read.energy_policy: No energy or prosody inferred from transcript text.

non_claims: not energy, prosody, audio, visual, comment, engagement, or creator-level scoring
